summary: Joe Reis announces an 'Unhinged AI Vibe Coding Hackathon' for November 2025, encouraging participants to embrace chaos and build experimental apps using AI coding assistants. The event explicitly rejects traditional enterprise concerns like KPIs and production readiness in favor of creative experimentation.
key_points: Projects must use AI APIs or coding assistants and include AI-generated features
Awards celebrate chaos: 'Most Unhinged App', 'Best AI Abuse', 'How Is This Even Working?'
Explicitly anti-enterprise: no KPIs, alignment, or production readiness required
money_quotes: Forget enterprise KPIs. Forget 'alignment.' Forget 'production readiness.'
If you suck at writing code, or can't code at all, even better!
Let's make something that shouldn't work — but does.
key_insight: AI coding tools have lowered the barrier to building software enough that hackathons can now celebrate creative chaos over technical polish.
